title: Spicy Tender Portuguese Chicken Stir-fry
description: A crowd-pleasing dish that combines tender chicken with a spicy kick, served over rice for an easy and high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Season chicken with black pepper and ground cumin.
Sauté garlic, onion, and a pinch of crushed red pepper flakes in butter until translucent. Add the minced garlic and stir-fry for another minute.
Add soy sauce and red pepper flakes to the mixture; season with more black pepper if needed.
Place chicken pieces on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Pour the marinade over them, ensuring they are well-coated.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes until the chicken is fully cooked and tender.

In a small saucepan, combine chicken broth, unsalted butter, ground cumin, red pepper flakes (if using), and parsley. Heat over medium heat, whisking well to dissolve the butter and create a smooth sauce.
Garnish with fresh parsley leaves before serving.
